name: com.hungnt.advertisement
description: Ads abstraction (IAdsService), multi-provider implementations (MAX, AdMob, IronSource stubs), and Service Locator integration. Depends on com.hungnt.core; optional com.applovin.mediation.ads when USE_MAX. AdMob/IronSource code is behind scripting defines; Google Mobile Ads / IronSource SDKs are wired in the consuming project.
